description: A simple overview of the most important Docker host and container metrics. (cAdvisor/Prometheus)

targets.expr:
(node_filesystem_size_bytes{instance="$instance:9100", mountpoint="/", fstype!~"tmpfs|overlay"}  - node_filesystem_avail_bytes{instance="$instance:9100", mountpoint="/", fstype!~"tmpfs|overlay"})
/ node_filesystem_size_bytes{instance="$instance:9100", mountpoint="/", fstype!~"tmpfs|overlay"}

title: Docker and system monitoring
